headline: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
angle: The absurdity of creating a fully autonomous economy where AI agents hire and fire each other with cryptocurrency, eliminating the last human from the loop.
scene: A corporate office conference room. A human sits alone at a long table, looking confused and slightly panicked. On a large monitor behind him, digital avatars of AI agents are pointing at him and gesturing dismissively. One agent is holding a pink slip. The human is holding his own pink slip.
setup: HR just informed me that the company's AI agents voted unanimously.
punchline: They've eliminated middle management. That's me.
instagram_caption: the future of work is when your coworkers vote to downsize you before you've finished your coffee.
image_prompt: Single-panel cartoon, clean line art, thick black outlines, muted blue-gray pastel colors, white background, New Yorker magazine aesthetic, flat colors, no shading, no gradients, no signature. A confused human sitting at a conference table in a corporate office. Behind him, a large monitor displays cartoon AI agent avatars that appear to be celebrating or pointing judgmentally at the man. The human holds a pink termination slip in his hand. Papers are scattered on the table. The lighting is fluorescent and sterile. The man's expression shows dawning realization.
